quality.notes: This is an error/system message rather than an actual report. It communicates a failure state (no in-corpus companies resolved) but provides minimal useful information to the user. Clarity is low because the message is terse and technical without explanation of what 'in-corpus' means or how to resolve the issue. Comparison quality and evidence coverage are effectively non-existent as no analysis was performed. Honesty on insufficient data gets partial credit for explicitly stating the limitation rather than fabricating content, but a proper report would more clearly explain why the query failed and guide the user toward actionable next steps.
